Author: MathDad
Name: Senpan Admin Companion
Description: Serves as an alternative to many of the web-interface functions, allowing staff to operate various systems from within the game.
Punchline: Allows Senpan Tea House staff to use various app services right from the game.
Changelog: The Bingo Cards tab now handles custom-card requests. A new Status column shows pending (grey star) and approved (gold star) custom cards and Protected (lock) cards, and each row gains Approve and Protect/Unprotect actions. Approving a pending request makes the card playable and automatically Protects it; Protected cards are spared by 'Delete all' (and can still be deleted individually). Hover a custom card's star to see the requester's character and world.
